title: csplit
html:
csplit

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

csplit /path/to/input-file 1
cat xx01

File Write

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

echo DATA >/path/to/temp-file
csplit -z -b '%doutput-file' /path/to/temp-file 1
excerpt: csplit File Read Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged csplit /path/to/input-file 1 cat xx01 File Write Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged echo DATA >/path/to/temp-file csplit -z -b '%doutput-file&
